recap: Added 23 behavioral tests for build_tab_data covering guard, basic fields, title construction, active/inactive colors, and separator.

Created test_pick_tabs.py with 14 behavioral tests covering get_tab_width, get_full_tab_bar_width, get_active_tab_index, and pick_tabs_to_display (all-fits, priority order, budget break, OOB bounds, statusbar headroom).
Created test_tabs_first_pass.py with 12 behavioral tests covering Reload/Redraw Beacon timing, manifest population, allTabIds dedup, separator bg, and end-of-cycle pick_tabs trigger.
